topArticle.title: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
topArticle.description: There were some lines in the speech that may have buoyed Democrats – and raised eyebrows in the White House.
topArticle.titleJa: 国王の歴史的な連邦議会演説からの5つのポイント
topArticle.summary: 国王の連邦議会演説から、民主党を喜ばせ、ホワイトハウスを眉をひそめさせた可能性のある発言を5つ紹介します。

topArticle.title: Kim Jong Un praises troops who 'self-blasted' to avoid capture by Ukraine
topArticle.description: It confirms suspicions that North Korean soldiers are being told to detonate their grenades to kill themselves.
topArticle.titleJa: 金正恩氏、ウクライナの捕虜となるのを避けるため「自爆」した兵士を称賛
topArticle.summary: 北朝鮮兵士が自決するために手榴弾を爆発させるよう指示されているとの疑いが確認されました。

topArticle.title: Calls for humanitarian corridor through strait of Hormuz as Iran war hits vital aid
topArticle.description:
Soaring oil prices and the blockade are preventing food, fuel and medicine being delivered to millions of people in desperate need, say NGOs
The volatility of global oil prices caused by the US and Israel’s war on Iran is taking a toll on the most vulnerable people, by slowing or blocking food and medical aid from reaching them.
Now aid organisations are calling for a “humanitarian corridor” to be opened through the strait of Hormuz amid rocketing transportation costs.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: ホルムズ海峡の人道回廊がイラン戦争による不可欠な援助を妨げるとして求められる
topArticle.summary: イランとイスラエルの戦争による原油価格の高騰と封鎖が、食料、燃料、医薬品の供給を妨げ、数百万人の困窮者を苦しめている。NGOは人道回廊を求めている。

topArticle.title: Russia claims its Africa Corps group prevented coup in Mali after rebels seize towns
topArticle.description:
Kremlin-controlled paramilitaries also alleged it inflicted ‘irreplaceable losses’ on insurgents avoiding civilian casualties
Russia’s defence ministry has claimed its Africa Corps – the successor to the former Wagner mercenary group – prevented a coup in Mali over the weekend, avoiding mass civilian casualties and inflicting “irreplaceable losses” on rebel insurgents.
It said in a statement that its troops in the desert town of Kidal near the Algerian border had fought for more than 24 hours while completely surrounded and vastly outnumbered. It also alleged, without providing evidence, that the militants had been trained by European mercenary instructors, including Ukrainians. The casualty toll was not specified.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: ロシア、反乱鎮圧でマリのクーデター阻止を主張、反政府勢力に「取り返しのつかない損失」
topArticle.summary: ロシア国防省は、マリでクーデターを阻止し、反政府勢力に大損害を与えたと主張。民間人の犠牲は回避したとしている。

topArticle.title: Faisal Islam: Why the UAE's exit from Opec is a big deal
topArticle.description: It will have little effect on the current oil blockades, but it could change everything afterwards.
topArticle.titleJa: ファイサル・イスラム：UAEのOPEC脱退はなぜ大きな問題なのか
topArticle.summary: 現在の石油封鎖への影響は少ないが、その後のすべてを変える可能性がある。

topArticle.title: Afghanistan women footballers can return to competition after FIFA rule changes
topArticle.description: Afghanistan women will become a "symbol of resilience" after Fifa approved their return to international competition, says former captain Khalida Popal.

topArticle.title: Australian mother who faked son's cancer to fund lavish lifestyle jailed
topArticle.description: The mother-of-two shaved her six-year-old's son's head and eyebrows as part of the deception.

topArticle.summary: 2児の母が、6歳の息子にがんを患わせたように見せかけ、寄付金を詐取した罪で有罪判決を受けた。

topArticle.title: Japan Airlines trials humanoid robots as ground handlers
topArticle.description: These robots may in future help clean cabins and operate ground support equipment.

topArticle.summary: 将来的には、客室清掃や地上支援機器の操作にロボットが役立つ可能性がある。

topArticle.title: Germany news: Cabinet discusses 2027 budget plans as Iran war threatens finances
topArticle.description: The Cabinet hopes to sign off on core points of its 2027 budget, so it can start to move through parliament. Germany already plans massive borrowing next year, before adequately factoring in Iran-based costs. Follow DW.
topArticle.titleJa: ドイツ：イラン戦争が財政を脅かす中、内閣が2027年予算計画を協議
topArticle.summary: 内閣は2027年予算の主要項目を承認し、議会での審議を進めたいと考えています。ドイツはすでに、イラン関連費用を十分に考慮する前に、来年の巨額借入を計画しています。

topArticle.title: Thailand ex-PM Thaksin Shinawatra is granted early parole
topArticle.description: The influential former prime minister of Thailand, Thaksin Shinawatra, is set to be released from prison in May. He was serving a one-year prison term for corruption that began in September.
topArticle.titleJa: タイ元首相タクシン氏、仮釈放へ
topArticle.summary: タイの元首相タクシン・シナワトラ氏が5月に釈放される見込みです。汚職罪で1年の刑に服していました。

topArticle.title: South Korea: Yoon's obstruction sentence hiked to 7 years
topArticle.description: Yoon has also been handed a life sentence for leading an insurrection in a separate trial. The prison sentences follow his failed attempt to impose martial law in 2024.
topArticle.titleJa: 韓国：ユン氏の職権妨害罪、刑期7年に延長
topArticle.summary: ユン氏は、別件で反乱教唆罪により終身刑も言い渡されています。2024年の戒厳令布告失敗を受けての判決です。

topArticle.title: Hungary's Magyar meets EU's von der Leyen in high-stakes Brussels visit
topArticle.description: Even before Peter Magyar takes office as Hungary's prime minister, he is looking to unlock €10 billion in EU funding ahead of an August deadline. Talks with Ursula von der Leyen come as part of a post-Orban EU reset.
topArticle.titleJa: ハンガリーのマジャール氏、EUのフォン・デア・ライエン委員長とブリュッセルで会談
topArticle.summary: マジャール氏は、首相就任前にEUからの100億ユーロの資金解除を目指しています。ポスト・オルバーン時代を見据えた会談です。

topArticle.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
topArticle.description: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

topArticle.summary: 停戦延長にもかかわらずレバノンで6人が死亡する中、イスラエル首相がヒズボラへの攻撃を指示。

topArticle.title: India news: Final West Bengal poll phase begins amid violence, rigging claims
topArticle.description: Mamata Banerjee's TMC and Narendra Modi's BJP are locked in a high-stakes battle in the final round of voting. Meanwhile, rain has provided some respite to the heat in Delhi. DW has the latest.
topArticle.titleJa: インド：西ベンガル州、暴力や不正操作の主張の中で選挙最終段階へ
topArticle.summary: マタ・バネルジー氏のTMCとナレンドラ・モディ氏のBJPが、西ベンガル州の最終投票ラウンドで激しい戦いを繰り広げています。一方、ニューデリーでは雨が暑さから一時的な安堵をもたらしています。

topArticle.title: ‘It will never cover what’s authentic’: African music industry weighs up AI risks and rewards
topArticle.description:
Delegates at event in Cape Verde highlight opportunities from tech while stressing AI is no replacement for talent
Last July, the Nigerian singer-songwriter Fave found herself caught up in a viral moment: an unauthorised version of a track featuring an AI choir had been released, quickly becoming an internet sensation. To get ahead of the situation, she recorded her own remix that integrated the AI-assisted song and added it to her discography.
“In my view, [that] was smart and very business aware,” Oyinkansola Fawehinmi, a Lagos-based entertainment lawyer, observed a few months later. “She essentially reclaimed the ‘AI version’ and released it as her own official expression.”
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 「本物には決して追いつけない」アフリカ音楽産業、AIのリスクと報酬を検討
topArticle.summary: ケープベルデでのイベントで、AIの機会と才能への代替にならないという懸念が議論された。アフリカの音楽産業はAIの台頭に直面している。

topArticle.title: Fears of resurgence in Somali piracy after three vessels hijacked in a week
topArticle.description:
Pirates appear to be taking advantage of international naval strength being diverted to Middle East
Three vessels have been hijacked off the coast of Somalia in the past week, raising fears of a resurgence in piracy around the Horn of Africa, and adding to the woes of the global shipping industry.
The merchant vessel Sward was taken over on 26 April, a day after a dhow was seized. These followed the 21 April hijacking of Honour 25, a motor tanker carrying 18,000 barrels of oil, according to the Maritime Security Centre Indian Ocean (MSCIO), the tracking service of the EU’s naval force.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: ソマリア海賊の復活の懸念、1週間で3隻がハイジャック
topArticle.summary: ソマリア沖で1週間に3隻の船舶がハイジャックされ、海賊行為の復活が懸念されている。国際海軍の戦力が中東に転用されていることが原因とみられる。

topArticle.title: US soldier pleads not guilty to charges of betting on Nicolás Maduro’s ouster
topArticle.description:
Prosecutors allege Gannon Van Dyke won $400,000 using insider information to bet on Maduro raid on Polymarket

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

The US army soldier charged with winning $400,000 by using insider information to bet on the removal of the ousted Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro pleaded not guilty to fraud charges on Tuesday.
Gannon Ken Van Dyke, 38, entered the plea in US district judge Margaret Garnett’s courtroom in Manhattan. Van Dyke sported a shaved head and wore a black blazer, jeans and brown shoes as he arrived to the courtroom with his lawyers, Zach Intrater and Mark Geragos.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 米兵、ニコラス・マドゥロ大統領失脚への賭けで無罪を主張
topArticle.summary: 米兵が、ニコラス・マドゥロ大統領失脚に関するインサイダー情報で40万ドルを稼いだとされる詐欺罪に対し、無罪を主張した。

topArticle.title: Mexican special forces arrest top commander of cartel and his alleged money launderer
topArticle.description:
Arrests of Audias Flores and César Alejandro ‘N’ lead to gunmen blocking roads, as US embassy warns employees to avoid Reynosa after earlier arrest
The Mexican authorities have arrested two top criminals, one of them a close ally of the slain founder of the Jalisco New Generation cartel (CJNG), prompting gunmen to block roads in the western state of Nayarit.
Audias Flores, known as “El Jardinero”, is a regional commander in control of swathes of CJNG territory along Mexico’s Pacific coast. He was considered a potential successor to Nemesio Oseguera, alias “El Mencho”, who ran the cartel and was killed in a security operation in February.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: メキシコ特殊部隊、麻薬カルテル幹部とそのマネーロンダラーを逮捕
topArticle.summary: メキシコ当局は、麻薬カルテル「CJNG」の主要幹部とその共犯者を逮捕。これを受け、道路封鎖などの抗議活動が発生し、米国大使館は注意を呼びかけた。

topArticle.title: EU Commissioner Mînzatu counting on Romanian 'pro-European stance' despite feared eurosceptic turn

topArticle.description: Climate change negatively impacts human, animal, and plant species. In the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), this crisis is leading beehives, which are vital to food security, to run dry.

topArticle.summary: ハキマ・ブケルイスは、国際的な警察キャンペーンで特定された5人目の女性である。

topArticle.title: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
topArticle.description: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.

topArticle.title: Brazil: A warning on how AI and deepfakes can become an ’excessive risk‘ to women and girls

topArticle.summary: AIとディープフェイクの進歩がジェンダー暴力のリスクを高め、プラットフォームの責任について論じられています。

topArticle.title: AI hype narrative reaches the public healthcare system in El Salvador

topArticle.summary: AI支援による公衆衛生システムの変革が、世界で最も先進的なシステムになると政府が主張しています。

topArticle.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
topArticle.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.

topArticle.summary: ハリケーン・マリア以降、プエルトリコの電力システムは危機に直面し、停電が日常化しています。

topArticle.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme

topArticle.summary: 50年間順調に運営されてきたキューバからの医療人材受け入れプログラムを終了することは、異例の動きです。

topArticle.title: DG Okonjo-Iweala welcomes Chief Executive Sam Hou Fai of Macao, China to the WTO
topArticle.description: Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala met with the Chief Executive of Macao, China, Sam Hou Fai on 23 April at the WTO. They discussed the active role Macao, China plays at the WTO and its strong support for the multilateral trading system. As trade openness and transparency are key to Macao, China's strong economic performance, both leaders highlighted the importance of the WTO for supporting the ongoing contribution of Macao, China to the global economy.
topArticle.titleJa: オコンジョ＝イウェアラ事務局長、マカオ特別行政区の行政長官と会談
topArticle.summary: WTO事務局長は、マカオ特別行政区の行政長官と会談し、WTOにおけるマカオの役割と多角的貿易システムへの支援について議論しました。

topArticle.title: NZ axes plan for WW2 sex slaves statue after Japan protest
topArticle.description: Tokyo had warned that installing the structure in Auckland could jeopardise diplomatic relations.
topArticle.titleJa: 日本からの抗議を受け、NZが第二次世界大戦の慰安婦像設置計画を中止
topArticle.summary: 日本政府は、オークランドでの慰安婦像設置が外交関係を損なう可能性があると警告していた。

topArticle.title: Forty-six women-led businesses in Jordan to benefit from WEIDE digital trade programme
topArticle.description: Forty-six women-led businesses in Jordan have been selected as beneficiaries of the Women Exporters in the Digital Economy (WEIDE) Fund, allowing them to begin a year-long programme to strengthen their participation in international trade. The announcement was made in Amman on 23 April at a launch event hosted by the Jordan Enterprise Development Corporation (JEDCO), WEIDE's partner business support organization in the country.
topArticle.titleJa: ヨルダンの女性主導46社、WEIDEデジタル貿易プログラムの恩恵を受ける
topArticle.summary: ヨルダンの女性主導企業46社が、国際貿易への参加を強化するWEIDEプログラムの対象となりました。

topArticle.title: Canada launches safeguard investigation on certain wood goods
topArticle.description: On 23 April 2026, Canada notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated on 21 April 2026 a safeguard investigation on imports of certain wood goods.
topArticle.titleJa: カナダ、一部木材製品に対するセーフガード調査を開始
topArticle.summary: カナダは、一部木材製品の輸入に関するセーフガード調査を開始したとWTOに通報しました。

topArticle.title: Ethiopia steps up domestic reforms to advance WTO accession negotiations
topArticle.description: Speaking at a meeting of the Working Party on Ethiopia's accession to the WTO held on 22 and 23 April, Ethiopia's Minister of Trade and Regional Integration and Chief Trade Negotiator, Kassahun Gofe Balami, informed members of several key decisions taken by the Ethiopian Government in response to members' requests. He reported that the negotiations have "reached a decisive juncture" and reiterated Ethiopia's commitment to engage constructively and substantively to advance and finalize the accession process.
topArticle.titleJa: エチオピア、WTO加盟交渉進展のため国内改革を強化
topArticle.summary: エチオピアは、WTO加盟交渉を加速させるための国内改革を強化しており、加盟国との建設的な関与を表明しています。

topArticle.title: Madagascar launches safeguard investigation on certain tableware, kitchenware, and household and packaging articles
topArticle.description: On 17 April 2026, Madagascar notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated on 15 April 2026 a safeguard investigation on imports of certain tableware, kitchenware, and household and packaging articles, of plastics.
topArticle.titleJa: マダガスカル、一部陶磁器・家庭用品のセーフガード調査を開始
topArticle.summary: マダガスカルは、一部のプラスチック製食器、調理器具、家庭用品・包装材の輸入に関するセーフガード調査を開始したとWTOに通報しました。
